title: dryopteris exsculpta
intro: Dryopteris exsculpta, also known as the autumn fern or scaly male fern, is a species of fern native to eastern Asia and North America, characterized by its distinctive scaly rhizome and fronds. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Dryopteris exsculpta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use by drying the fronds and rhizome, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
